property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: Un client PREMIUM bénéficie de 10 pourcent de remise
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Un client PREMIUM bénéficie de 10 pourcent de remise &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/order-premium.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mun produit &amp#27;[1m"MOUSE-01"&amp#27;[22m existe avec un prix de &amp#27;[1m50.0&amp#27;[22m et un stock de &amp#27;[1m20&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.unProduitExiste(java.lang.String,double,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mle client &amp#27;[1m"premium@example.com"&amp#27;[22m a le profil &amp#27;[1mPREMIUM&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leClientALeProfil(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mle client &amp#27;[1m"premium@example.com"&amp#27;[22m commande &amp#27;[1m4&amp#27;[22m unités du produit &amp#27;[1m"MOUSE-01"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leClientCommande(java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mla commande est acceptée&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.laCommandeEstAcceptee()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mle montant total est de &amp#27;[1m180.0&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leMontantTotalEstDe(double)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mle message de confirmation est &amp#27;[1m"Order confirmed for premium@example.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leMessageDeConfirmationEst(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\Esteban Dauchy\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.7\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.7.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: La commande est refusée si le produit n'existe pas
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m La commande est refusée si le produit n'existe pas &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/order-rejected-product.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mle produit &amp#27;[1m"UNKNOWN-99"&amp#27;[22m n'existe pas&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leProduitNExistePas(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mle client &amp#27;[1m"client@example.com"&amp#27;[22m a le profil &amp#27;[1mSTANDARD&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leClientALeProfil(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mle client &amp#27;[1m"client@example.com"&amp#27;[22m commande &amp#27;[1m1&amp#27;[22m unité du produit &amp#27;[1m"UNKNOWN-99"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leClientCommande(java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mla commande est refusée&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.laCommandeEstRefusee()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mle motif de refus est &amp#27;[1m"Product not found"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leMotifDeRefusEst(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: La commande est refusée si le stock est insuffisant
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m La commande est refusée si le stock est insuffisant &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/order-rejected-stock.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mun produit &amp#27;[1m"CABLE-01"&amp#27;[22m existe avec un prix de &amp#27;[1m15.0&amp#27;[22m et un stock de &amp#27;[1m3&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.unProduitExiste(java.lang.String,double,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mle client &amp#27;[1m"client@example.com"&amp#27;[22m a le profil &amp#27;[1mSTANDARD&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leClientALeProfil(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mle client &amp#27;[1m"client@example.com"&amp#27;[22m commande &amp#27;[1m5&amp#27;[22m unités du produit &amp#27;[1m"CABLE-01"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leClientCommande(java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mla commande est refusée&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.laCommandeEstRefusee()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mle motif de refus est &amp#27;[1m"Insufficient stock"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leMotifDeRefusEst(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Un client STANDARD passe une commande sans remise
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Un client STANDARD passe une commande sans remise &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/order-standard.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mun produit &amp#27;[1m"LAPTOP-01"&amp#27;[22m existe avec un prix de &amp#27;[1m1000.0&amp#27;[22m et un stock de &amp#27;[1m10&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.unProduitExiste(java.lang.String,double,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mle client &amp#27;[1m"std@example.com"&amp#27;[22m a le profil &amp#27;[1mSTANDARD&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leClientALeProfil(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mle client &amp#27;[1m"std@example.com"&amp#27;[22m commande &amp#27;[1m2&amp#27;[22m unités du produit &amp#27;[1m"LAPTOP-01"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leClientCommande(java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mla commande est acceptée&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.laCommandeEstAcceptee()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mle montant total est de &amp#27;[1m2000.0&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leMontantTotalEstDe(double)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mle message de confirmation est &amp#27;[1m"Order confirmed for std@example.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leMessageDeConfirmationEst(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Un client VIP bénéficie de 20 pourcent de remise
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Un client VIP bénéficie de 20 pourcent de remise &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/order-vip.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mun produit &amp#27;[1m"KEYBOARD-01"&amp#27;[22m existe avec un prix de &amp#27;[1m100.0&amp#27;[22m et un stock de &amp#27;[1m5&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.unProduitExiste(java.lang.String,double,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mle client &amp#27;[1m"vip@example.com"&amp#27;[22m a le profil &amp#27;[1mVIP&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leClientALeProfil(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mle client &amp#27;[1m"vip@example.com"&amp#27;[22m commande &amp#27;[1m2&amp#27;[22m unités du produit &amp#27;[1m"KEYBOARD-01"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leClientCommande(java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mla commande est acceptée&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.laCommandeEstAcceptee()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mle montant total est de &amp#27;[1m160.0&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leMontantTotalEstDe(double)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mle message de confirmation est &amp#27;[1m"Order confirmed for vip@example.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.steps.OrderSteps.leMessageDeConfirmationEst(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m
